debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
s : Set ℝ
hs : MeasurableSet s
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in s, exp x * f (exp x) = ∫ (y : ℝ) in exp '' s, f y

failed_attempts:
rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).derivWithin
      exp_injective.injOn]
  congr 1 with x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) exp_injective]
  simp only [abs_exp, smul_eq_mul]

have hf : ∀ x, HasDerivAt exp (exp x) x := Real.hasDerivAt_exp
  have hinj : InjOn exp s := exp_injective.injOn
  rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => (hf x).hasFDerivAt) hinj]
  simp only [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_exp, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm (f _)]

have hexp : Measurable exp := measurable_exp
  have hinj : InjOn exp s := exp_injective.injOn
  have hdiff : ∀ x ∈ s, HasDerivAt exp (exp x) x := fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x
  rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs hdiff hinj]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).differentiableAt
    exp_injective (f := exp) (f' := exp)]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).injOn
    (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) (fun x _ => exp_ne_zero x)]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).differentiableAt.injOn
      (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) (fun x _ => exp_pos x).ne']
  simp only [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_pos (exp_pos _), smul_eq_mul]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).differentiableAt.injOn
    (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) (fun x _ => exp_ne_zero x)]
  simp only [abs_of_pos (exp_pos _), smul_eq_mul]

rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).injOn]
  · congr 1
    ext x
    simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul]
  · exact fun x _ => (hasDerivAt_exp x).continuousAt.continuousWithinAt

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x)
    (exp_injective.injOn)]
  simp only [abs_exp, smul_eq_mul]

have hexp : ∀ x, HasDerivAt exp (exp x) x := fun x => hasDerivAt_exp x
  have hinj : InjOn exp s := exp_injective.injOn
  have hdiff : ∀ x ∈ s, HasDerivWithinAt exp (exp x) s x := fun x _ => (hexp x).hasDerivWithinAt
  rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs hdiff hinj]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).differentiableAt.injOn
      (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) (fun x => f x)]
  simp only [abs_exp, smul_eq_mul]

rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs
    (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) (exp_injective.injOn)]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

have h1 : ∀ x ∈ s, HasDerivAt exp (exp x) x := fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x
  have h2 : InjOn exp s := exp_injective.injOn
  rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs h2 h1]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).injOn
      (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x)]
  simp only [abs_exp, smul_eq_mul]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) exp_injective]
  simp only [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_exp, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).hasFDerivAt
      exp_injective.injOn]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).differentiableAt
    exp_injective f]
  congr 1 with x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).derivWithinAt
    (exp_injective.injOn)]
  simp only [abs_exp, smul_eq_mul]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).differentiableAt.injOn
      (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) (fun x _ => f (exp x))]
  simp only [abs_of_pos (exp_pos _), smul_eq_mul]

have hexp : ∀ x, HasDerivAt exp (exp x) x := Real.hasDerivAt_exp
  have hinj : InjOn exp s := exp_injective.injOn
  have hdiff : ∀ x ∈ s, HasDerivWithinAt exp (exp x) s x := fun x _ => (hexp x).hasDerivWithinAt
  rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs hdiff hinj]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).differentiableAt.injOn (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x)]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs
    (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) exp_injective.injOn]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs
    (fun x _ => (Real.hasDerivAt_exp x).hasFDerivAt) (Real.exp_injective.injOn)]
  simp only [Real.deriv_exp, abs_of_pos (Real.exp_pos _), smul_eq_mul]

have hexp : Measurable exp := measurable_exp
  have hinj : InjOn exp s := exp_injective.injOn
  have hdiff : ∀ x ∈ s, HasDerivWithinAt exp (exp x) s x := fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x |>.hasDerivWithinAt
  rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs hdiff hinj]
  congr 1 with x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

have hexp : ∀ x, HasDerivAt exp (exp x) x := fun x => hasDerivAt_exp x
  have hinj : InjOn exp s := exp_injective.injOn
  rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs hinj (fun x _ => (hexp x).hasFDerivAt)]
  simp only [_root_.abs_of_pos (exp_pos _), smul_eq_mul]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).differentiableAt.injOn
      (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) (fun x _ => f (exp x))]
  simp only [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_pos (exp_pos _), smul_eq_mul]
  done

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).differentiableAt.injOn
      (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) (fun x _ => exp x * f (exp x))]
  · congr 1
    ext x
    simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x).hasFDerivAt
    exp_injective]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x)]

have hexp : ∀ x ∈ s, HasDerivWithinAt exp (exp x) s x := fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x |>.hasDerivWithinAt
  have hinj : InjOn exp s := exp_injective.injOn
  have hdiff : ∀ x ∈ s, DifferentiableWithinAt ℝ exp s x := fun x hx => (hexp x hx).differentiableWithinAt
  rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs hdiff hinj]
  congr 1
  ext x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]

rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs
    (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x) (exp_injective.injOn)]
  simp only [Real.deriv_exp, abs_exp, smul_eq_mul]

rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs 
      (fun x _ => (Real.exp_pos x).ne') (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_exp x)]
  simp only [abs_exp, smul_eq_mul]
  done
